title: Workhorse W56 Extended Wheelbase Model Achieves FMVSS and HVIP Certification
text: Workhorse W56 Extended Wheelbase Model achieved FMVSS and HVIP certification and entered full production for Q4 2024 deliveries. The 208-inch extended wheelbase model features over 100 enhancements to the original step van model and is designed for last-mile delivery. The new W56 model features a 208-inch wheelbase, 1,200 cubic feet cargo volume, improved service access, new charge port locations, and modular accessories. An order of 13 extended wheelbase vehicles was secured in 2024 for delivery to a national provider of uniforms and workplace supplies in 2025. Standard production of the extended wheelbase began in Q3 2024 at Workhorse's Union City, Indiana facility.
